title: pongelion malabaricum
intro: Pongelion malabaricum, also known as Dillenia, is a tropical plant native to the Malabar region, characterized by its unique, large leaves and bright red flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pongelion malabaricum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are often used to treat skin irritations and wounds.
